long_description:
[METAL] Failed Baremetal Provisions is Triggered

TIP Situation: Provision job has failed
TIP Short Description: A baremetal provision has failed in mzone2c7 for server_action: 197d68a4-2bc7-4ee0-95f1-b580882bbcdf
TIP Console: toc
TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-bare-metal-server:::mzone2c7::

Event Generated:

Metric:

Segment:
    cluster = 'mzone2c7' and kube_job_label_server_action_name = '197d68a4-2bc7-4ee0-95f1-b580882bbcdf'
